name: TestIso11783IL_OPSaveAuxAssignment
title: TestIso11783IL_OPSaveAuxAssignment
syntax: long TestIso11783IL_OPSaveAuxAssignment( dbNode node, char filename[] );
description: The function saves the current auxiliary input assignment as Preferred Auxiliary Input Assignment in an INI file.
With the function Iso11783IL_OPLoadAuxAssignment the "Preferred Assignment" can be load and used again.
Dependent on the used parameter type the appropriate bus context in a multibus environment has only to be set before the function is called if the corresponding database object will be ambiguous.
Further information on site MultiBus Environment.

parameters.name: node
parameters.description: Simulation node to apply the function.
